name: Botnet Development Detected
description: Detection of activities related to botnet development. This activity may indicate an adversary's attempt to create or maintain a network of malicious bots. This is a critical indicator of resource development as part of the reconnaissance phase of an attack.

prompts.prompt: A potential botnet development activity has been detected in a code repository. The repository name **{repo_name}** contains the term 'botnet', which is a strong indicator of a malicious project. The activity was performed by the user **{user}** from the IP address **{source_address}** at **{timestamp}**. This aligns with the **MITRE ATT&CK T1586.002** (Develop Capabilities: Botnet) technique. Further investigation is needed to determine the nature of this activity. Check if the user is authorized to perform security research or if this is an unauthorized malicious project.

parameters.name: repo_name
parameters.description: The name of the code repository.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user who performed the activity.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the activity.
